title: Oh... Rosalinda!!
actors: Anthony Quayle, Anton Walbrook, Dennis Price
plot: "Die Fledermaus" (The Bat) is the pseudonym adopted by Dr. Falke (Anton Walbrook). Floating on the buoyant waltzes of Strauss, this Viennese romp is sure to please. Disguises, tricks, and every kind of deception combine to reveal ...
